build.beforeBuildCommand: bazelisk build //frankweiler/backend/http:frankweiler_http_bin //frankweiler/backend/sync:frankweiler_sync_bin && d="$(bazelisk info workspace)/frankweiler/tauri/binaries" && b="$(bazelisk info bazel-bin)" && mkdir -p "$d" && cp -f "$b/frankweiler/backend/http/frankweiler_http_bin" "$d/frankweiler-http" && cp -f "$b/frankweiler/backend/sync/frankweiler_sync_bin" "$d/frankweiler-sync" && chmod u+w "$d/frankweiler-http" "$d/frankweiler-sync" && { [ -z "${APPLE_SIGNING_IDENTITY:-}" ] || codesign --force --options runtime --timestamp --sign "$APPLE_SIGNING_IDENTITY" "$d/frankweiler-http" "$d/frankweiler-sync"; }
